haveDevice: I'm ready to scan the QR code with my phone
busyHint: Please wait a few minutes and refresh this page. Your UUID link is still valid.
linkedHint: If WhatsApp shows it under Linked devices, you’re done.
scanHint: When the QR code appears, open WhatsApp → Linked Devices on your phone and scan to connect.
saveHint: This link contains your UUID. Save it — you can use it later to relink, check status, or manage your subscription.
helpHintPrefix: If you need help, submit the form at
helpHintSuffix: and include this link (or the UUID in it).
verifyFirst: Complete verification first. After it passes, click “Get QR code”.
qrReady: QR ready. Scan it in WhatsApp → Linked devices.
linkedOk: ✅ Linked! This delivery machine is now connected.
qrCodeExpiredRetry: ❌ QR code expired. Please click Retry to generate a new one.
pleaseVerifyAgainThenGetQr: Please verify again, then click “Get QR code”.
linkExpiredRetry: ❌ This link has expired. Please click Retry to generate a new one.
previouslyLinkedDisconnected: ⚠️ Previously linked, but currently disconnected. Click “Retry” to relink and generate a new QR.
cannotReachRetry: Cannot reach the delivery machine (status failed). Click “Retry”.
qrExpiredSessionEnded: QR expired (session ended). Click “Get a new QR” and verify again.
failedGenerateQrSessionEnded: Failed to generate QR (session ended). Click “Get a new QR” to retry.
verifyLoadFail: Verification failed to load. Please refresh and try again.
verifyInitFail: Verification failed to initialize. Please refresh.
verifyRenderFail: Verification render failed. Please refresh or try another network.
pageIntro: 🔒 This only creates a bot session. Your WhatsApp account and private chats are not accessed.
openOtherDevice: If you're viewing this page on a computer, open WhatsApp → Linked Devices on your phone and scan the QR code below.
cantScanSamePhone: After connecting, your AI assistant will appear in WhatsApp.
linkedStrong: This delivery machine is now connected to your WhatsApp.
closePageHint: You can close this page. To relink later, open your saved delivery link.
afterScanningHint: After a successful scan, this page will automatically confirm the device is connected.
paidHint: You can relink WhatsApp here. For billing actions (cancel / payment method), please contact support.
nextStepAfterLinkedBody: Open WhatsApp and start a chat with your own phone number (self chat). Then send any message — you will receive the onboarding guide there.
nextStepAfterLinkedHint: Tip: search your number in WhatsApp, or use “Message yourself / Note to self” if available.
